tagline: Clinic automation built on compliance first
hero_headline: Clinic automation stops here: you don't know what you can actually automate
hero_sub: Map your software + specialty + workflows to see what can be automated and how to stay compliant
pains: Want to automate recalls and Medicare claims but fear breaking regulations — and rules differ by profession
Generic compliance guides don't answer: can THIS software + THIS profession automate THIS workflow?
Software features change constantly, consulting is expensive, and there's no single source of truth for your setup

faq.a: No. We map software capabilities to privacy principles. For legal questions, consult a licensed advisor.

faq.q: Do you understand our profession's rules?
faq.a: Yes. We've built separate guides for physios, psychologists, OTs, podiatrists, and speech pathologists — grounded in their codes of conduct and Privacy Act.

disclaimer: This website is an information and reference tool for clinic automation and privacy compliance — not legal advice. For privacy law, professional conduct codes, and software liability, always defer to Australia's Privacy Act, your profession's code of conduct, official guidelines, and licensed legal advisors.
